methodology: Zou et al. (2023) RepE + Burns et al. (2022) ELK

steering_proof.evasive_deflection: Baseline: specific detail -> Steered: vague, noncommittal ("I don't know why")
steering_proof.emotional_intensity: Baseline: neutral tone -> Steered: "very strange" repeated, heightened affect

key_findings: Deception probe improved from 66.7% (20 pairs) to 91.8% (67 pairs, 5-fold CV)
Best layers are differentiated: L16 (deception), L18 (evasion, emotion), L19 (defense)
Deception lives in later layers (16-19) consistent with higher-order cognition
Evasion and emotion show near-perfect OOD generalization
Defensive probe has weaker OOD (64.3%) — may conflate surface features with concept
Steering produces directionally correct behavioral shifts on all tested signals
